entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop studied for grain yield and micronutrient stability

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: The country where the pearl millet genotypes were tested

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, evaluated for stability across environments

entities.name: IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of iron in the grain of pearl millet

entities.name: ZINC CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in the grain of pearl millet

entities.name: AMMI METHOD
entities.description: Additive main effects and multiplicative interaction analysis used to study GEI

entities.name: GENOTYPE BY ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environmental conditions affecting trait expression

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The magnitude of genetic differences among the genotypes

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variance attributable to genetic variance

entities.name: STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of a genotype's performance across different environments

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A measured trait used to calculate genotypic and phenotypic variance

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWER
entities.description: A measured trait used to calculate heritability

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: Statistical method used to reveal variability among genotypes

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION
entities.description: A measure of the total variability of a trait

entities.name: GENOTYPIC COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION
entities.description: A measure of the genetic variability of a trait

entities.name: GB 8735
entities.description: A specific open-pollinated variety of pearl millet found to be stable for grain yield and micronutrients

entities.name: ICMV 221 WBR
entities.description: A specific open-pollinated variety of pearl millet found to be stable for grain yield and micronutrients

entities.name: SOSAT-C88
entities.description: A specific open-pollinated variety of pearl millet found to be stable for grain yield and micronutrients
